action_items: Review and optimize token usage for VIGIL agent, which incurred the highest compute cost at $0.021412.
Address the P1 bug identified by VIGIL: missing rate limiting on /api/auth/signup to prevent abuse.
Monitor marketing ad spend of $500.00, which accounts for 99.99% of total daily expenditure.
Optimize ad spend: CTR and conversion rates are below target; conduct A/B testing on ad copies to improve performance.
Review QUANT agent usage: Highest compute cost at $0.009044; investigate for inefficiencies in projection calculations.
Accelerate product launch: No revenue generated; align marketing and development to reduce time-to-market.
Review QUANT's token usage to identify and reduce unnecessary costs, as it is the most expensive agent.
Review SENTRY's competitor analysis to adjust market strategy for B2B SaaS developer tools.
Prioritize addressing HAVEN's user complaints: improve onboarding clarity and add export feature based on feedback.
Assess ARIA's identified security friction points for potential product enhancements.
